tasks.task_description: Create ADR for git workflow (pre-commit fast, pre-push integrity, CI full)
Update pre-commit.sh to include docs check

description: Setup git workflow with pre-commit (fast), pre-push (integrity), and CI (full quality gates)
context: Created ADR-014 for git workflow quality gates (pre-commit fast, pre-push integrity, CI full). Added docs check to pre-commit.sh

Created pre-push.sh script with integrity checks (gitleaks, pii, secrets, dangerous patterns, traceability, interface segregation, deps). Installed pre-push hook. Updated Makefile to install both hooks.
